login.title: Datapp
login.subtitle: Sign in to your tenant.
login.errorRateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a minute and try again.
login.errorLocked: Account temporarily locked after too many failed attempts. Try again in 15 minutes or reset your password.
login.totpHint: Open Google Authenticator (or your TOTP app) and copy the 6-digit code.
login.totpRequired: This account has 2FA — enter the code from your authenticator app.
login.recoveryCodeHint: Each code works only once. After using one, generate fresh codes from the security page.
login.errorOauthNotAuthorized: Your Google account is not authorized. Ask the owner to grant access.
login.oauthTwoFactorSubtitle: Your account {email} verified its identity with Google. Enter your authenticator code to finish signing in.
login.errorInvalidTotp: Authenticator code is invalid or expired.
login.errorInvalidRecovery: Recovery code is invalid or already used.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to set a new password. The link is valid for 30 minutes.
forgotPassword.successBody: If your email is on file you'll receive a message with instructions. Check your inbox (and spam folder).

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password. Minimum 12 characters. We'll sign you out everywhere.
resetPassword.passwordHint: Minimum 12 characters. Use a long passphrase or a password manager.
resetPassword.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters long.
resetPassword.errorMissingToken: Reset token is missing. Request a new email.
resetPassword.errorInvalid: This link is invalid or has expired. Request a new email.
resetPassword.successBody: You can now sign in with your new password.

overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: KPIs vs the equivalent previous period.

links.customersDescription: Identity, addresses, lifetime metrics for every synced customer.
links.productsDescription: Best sellers by units or revenue, filtered by date range.

chart.title: Revenue over time
chart.subtitle: Current vs previous period · bucketed by {granularity}.

customers.title: Customers
customers.searchPlaceholder: Search email, first name, last name…

charts.spendSubtitle: Sum of orders per month (real revenue when available).
charts.skuMixSubtitle: Top 5 SKUs by revenue · the rest grouped together.

customerDetail.noOrders: No orders synced for this customer yet.
customerDetail.productsSubtitle: Lifetime SKUs aggregated from order items.
customerDetail.noAddresses: No addresses returned by Magento for this customer.

privacy.heading: Data privacy
privacy.description: GDPR / data subject controls. Both actions are audit-logged.
privacy.confirmBody: Pseudonymizes name, email, phone, addresses, and order PII. Orders and analytics aggregates stay intact. Not reversible.

segments.title: Segments
segments.subtitle: Static customer segments. Membership snapshots at create time and refreshes on demand.

detail.membersSubtitle: Showing the first {count}. Member list is a snapshot — use Refresh to recompute against current data.
detail.deleteBody: The segment definition and member list will be removed. The customer profiles themselves are not affected.

form.title: New segment
form.subtitle: Save a customer filter as a static segment. Membership snapshots now and refreshes on demand.
form.missingName: Please give the segment a name.
form.name: Name
form.rfmHint: Match customers whose current RFM label is any of the selected.

orders.title: Orders
orders.onThisPage: {count} on this page · sorted by placed_at desc.
orders.footer: Cursor pagination — sorted by placed_at desc.

products.title: Top products
products.subtitle: Aggregated by SKU. Configurable parents are filtered out automatically.

tiles.penetrationSub: orders with this SKU / all orders

productAffinity.heading: Frequently bought together
productAffinity.subtitle: {confidenceLabel} = % of orders with this SKU that also include the row SKU. {liftLabel} > 1 means stronger association than chance. Excludes SKUs that only co-occur once.
productAffinity.noOrders: No orders contain this SKU yet.
productAffinity.notEnough: Not enough co-occurrence to compute affinity. Either this SKU is usually bought alone or there aren't enough multi-item orders yet.

regions.title: Regions · Argentina
regions.subtitle: Customers + orders + revenue per INDEC province. Customer counts are snapshot (independent of date range); buyers / orders / revenue are window-bound.
regions.unmatchedSubtitle: Magento sent us these region values that didn't match any row in the INDEC table. They're audit-only — fix the matcher in the region resolver if any of these represent a real province.

insights.title: Insights
insights.subtitlePrefix: When your customers buy and how long they keep coming back. All times in

cadence.title: Time between orders
cadence.empty: No repeat-purchase gaps in this window.

cohort.title: Cohort retention ({count} months)
cohort.summary: {customers} customers across the last {months} months. Each row is the customers acquired in that month; each column shows what % of them placed an order N months later. Empty cells = haven't happened yet.

coupons.title: Coupons
coupons.subtitle: Coupon code usage in the period. Auto cart-rule promotions (no code) reported separately at the bottom.

table.empty: No coupon codes used in this window. As soon as a customer applies one in Magento, it'll show up here.

auto.title: Automatic cart rules (no coupon code)
auto.subtitle: Orders that received a discount in the period without a coupon being typed in. Useful to compare promo-driven vs coupon-driven revenue.

carts.title: Abandoned carts
carts.subtitle: A cart is considered abandoned after 24 h of inactivity. Last sync: {when}.

tableSubtitle.open: Sorted by abandonment time. Customer column links to the Datapp profile when the shopper is registered.
tableSubtitle.recovered: Sorted by recovery time. Amount reflects real revenue (invoiced − refunded) when available.
tableSubtitle.expired: Carts that hit 30 days without recovery. Kept as history for analytics.

table.emptyOpen: No abandoned carts in this window.
table.emptyRecovered: No recoveries recorded in this window yet.
table.emptyExpired: No expired carts recorded in this window yet.

sync.title: Sync status
sync.subtitle: One row per Magento store × entity. Manual triggers and queue depth land in Iteration 4.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Accounts with access to the Datapp admin. Only the {adminRole} and {superAdminRole} roles can manage users.

roleHints.admin: Manages the tenant and its users.

form.createSubtitle: Create an account and share the password via a secure channel.
form.editSubtitle: Change the name, role, or reset the password.
form.name: Full name
form.emailReadonly: Email cannot be changed after the user is created.
form.passwordOptionalHint: Leave blank to let the user sign in with Google only. Setting one also enables email + password sign-in.
form.passwordHint: Leave blank to keep the current one.
form.missingFields: Please fill in the required fields.

delete.confirmBody: Deletes the user, invalidates their sessions, and writes an audit log entry. Not reversible.

twoFactor.resetConfirmBody: This removes the user's two-factor enrollment. They'll be able to sign in with just their password until they re-enable 2FA.

security.title: Security
security.enforcementBanner: Your role requires 2FA. Enable it to continue using the admin — the other sections stay locked until you finish.
security.subtitle: Set up two-factor authentication (2FA) with your authenticator app. Works with Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password, Microsoft Authenticator, and similar apps.
security.statusEnabledBody: Next sign-in will ask for a code from your authenticator. If you lose your device, an admin can reset it.
security.statusDisabledBody: Your account is only protected by the password. We recommend enabling 2FA for an extra layer.

enroll.heading: Scan the QR code
enroll.step1: 1. Open your app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password, etc.) and tap "Add account".
enroll.step2: 2. Scan this QR. If you can't scan, copy the secret below and enter it manually.
enroll.step3: 3. Enter the 6-digit code shown in the app to confirm.
enroll.errorInvalid: Invalid code — check your device clock and try again.

disable.heading: Disable 2FA
disable.body: To turn off two-factor authentication, confirm your password.

security.successEnabled: 2FA enabled. Next time you sign in we'll ask for the code.

recovery.codesBody: Save these somewhere safe (a password manager, printed copy). Each code works only once. If you lose your device, enter one of these at the login page instead of the authenticator code.
recovery.remaining: {count, plural, =0 {You have no recovery codes left. Generate new ones.} =1 {1 recovery code remaining.} other {# recovery codes remaining.}}
recovery.regenBody: We'll invalidate the old codes and generate 10 fresh ones. Confirm your password to continue.
recovery.regenSuccess: New codes generated. Make sure to save them before closing the page.

account.title: My account
account.subtitle: Your personal information and interface preferences.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.body: These options are personal and stored locally in your browser.

system.title: System
system.subtitle: Tenant-wide operations. Cache refresh affects every page that depends on aggregated data.

cache.title: Cache
cache.body: After a manual sync, or when data feels stale, refresh to regenerate the expensive reports (insights, regions, top products, coupons) on the next visit.

methodLabels.title: Payment and shipping method labels
methodLabels.body: Magento uses technical codes (mercadopago_basic, banktransfer). Map them to friendly names so your client recognizes them in reports. The code is visible in any order detail page.
methodLabels.mergeIntoHint: Leave empty for normal labels. Set to fold a legacy code into the canonical one.

excluded.title: Emails excluded from reports
excluded.body: Orders whose customer email matches this list are dropped from every report and metric (KPIs, regions, top products, cohorts, AOV, etc.). Useful to keep test orders from polluting the numbers.
excluded.emailHint: Start with @ to exclude an entire domain (e.g. @pupemoda.com.ar).

yoy.title: Monthly revenue by year
yoy.subtitle: One line per year, aligned month-to-month. The most recent year takes the primary color.

yoyOrders.title: Monthly order count by year
yoyOrders.subtitle: Same time axis and same color assignment per year. The legend shows the annual total.

histogram.title: Order value distribution
histogram.subtitle: {total} orders this year. The median ({median}) is marked with the orange line.

breakdown.noData: No data available for this dimension in the synced orders. Run a re-sync from Magento to refresh.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: Security-sensitive events — sign-ins, lockouts, password resets, 2FA changes, session revocations. Retain this for forensics.

permissions.title: Role permissions
permissions.subtitle: Choose which admin sections are visible to {analystRole} and {viewerRole}. {adminRole} and {superAdminRole} always see everything.
permissions.matrixHint: Tick the sections each role can see. Changes apply as soon as you save.
